content:
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
                      Brass in Pocket – The Pretenders
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

Written by: Chrissie Hynde/James Honeyman-Scott
From: “Pretenders” (1979)

Tabbed by: maguri
Tuning: Standard

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

[tab]CHORDS
          E-A-D-G-B-e
Aadd9     x-0-7-6-0-0[/tab]

A         x-0-2-2-2-0
Asus2     x-0-2-2-0-0
Asus4     x-0-2-2-3-0
F#m7      2-x-2-2-2-0[/tab]
[tab]Esus4/F#  2-x-2-2-0-0

[Intro]
| [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]      |

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]        [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
     I got brass       in pocket[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]          [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
     I got bottle,      I'm gonna use it[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]  [ch]Esus4/F#[/ch]     [ch]E7sus4/F#[/ch]   [ch]F#m7[/ch]        [ [ch]D[/ch] ]
        Intention,              I feel inventive[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]D/E[/ch]
 Gonna make you, make you, make you notice[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]        [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
     Got motion,   restrained emotion[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]          [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
     Been driving,      Detroit leaning[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]  [ch]Esus4/F#[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4/F#[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]            [ [ch]D[/ch] ]
      No reason,            just seems so pleasing[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]D/E[/ch]
 Gonna make you, make you, make you notice[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]E6[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
     Gonna use my arms,   gonna use my legs[/tab]
[tab][ch]E6[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
     Gonna use my style,  gonna use my sidestep[/tab]
[tab][ch]E6[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
     Gonna use my fingers, gonna use my[/tab]
[tab][ch]E6[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
My, my imagination[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Asus4[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause I gonna make you see[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bm/G[/ch]
There's nobody else here, no one like me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
I'm special (special), so special (special)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D/E[/ch]
I gotta have some of your attention, give it to me[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]         [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
     I got rhythm,     I can't miss a beat[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]               [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
     I got a new skank,      so reet[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]  [ch]Esus4/F#[/ch]      [ch]E7sus4/F#[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]      [ [ch]D[/ch] ]
       Got something,      I'm winking at you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]D/E[/ch]
 Gonna make you, make you, make you notice[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]E6[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

I'm special (special), so special (special)[/tab]
